title: Manager creates and closes an item-sales contest
purpose: Exercise the complete management lifecycle from setup through one immutable prize drawing.
starting_state: Use a freshly seeded disposable database
No drawing exists for the replacement contest

fixtures.prize: First choice of next week's shift meal

assignments: Create the configured item-count goal and prize in the UI
Enable both the featured race and goal board
Activate only after preview and explicit confirmation
Verify all active surfaces, finalize awards, preview the field, and draw once
success_conditions: Exactly one replacement contest is active
Every active server has one current Bingo card
Final game awards are persisted once
Exactly one drawing and entry snapshot exist
All required evidence and debrief artifacts validate
intentional_discoveries: Whether setup makes the live-entry path obvious
Whether the manager can reconcile score sources before irreversible actions
